hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Intervene effects to Super Intervene effects.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Super Intervene: Increases allied characters' CRIT DEF by 60%. When an ally is attacked, reduces the damage taken by that ally by 10% for 1 turn, up to 60%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: After assuming the #Entry_1# stance within 1 turn, lowers the skill level of all enemies and grants self a shield equal to #Factor_1# of max HP for 1 turn, up to 1 stack.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After assuming the #Entry_1# stance within 1 turn, lowers the skill level of all enemies and grants self a shield equal to #Factor_1# of max HP for 1 turn, up to 1 stack.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Intervene: Increases allied characters' CRIT DEF by 60%. When an ally is attacked, reduces the damage taken by that ally by 8% for 1 turn, up to 40%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Super Intervene: Increases allied characters' CRIT DEF by 60%. When an ally is attacked, reduces the damage taken by that ally by 10% for 1 turn, up to 60%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1075_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: While present, increases the basic stats of allied CCG characters by 20%. When self has a shield, 75% of the damage from single-target skills taken by allied CCG characters will be borne by self, and all allies take 20% reduced damage. When self has no shield, the damage taken in a hit will not exceed 40% of self's max HP.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: While present, increases the basic stats of allied CCG characters by 20%. When self has a shield, 75% of the damage from single-target skills taken by allied CCG characters will be borne by self, and all allies take 20% reduced damage. When self has no shield, the damage taken in a hit will not exceed 40% of self's max HP.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1075_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grants 1 #Entry_1# effect to allied CCG characters, up to 3 stacks. When allied CCG characters use active skills, additionally grants that character 1 #Entry_1# effect. For every 2 #Entry_1# effects that all allied characters have obtained, grants self 1 #Entry_2# effect, up to 6 stacks.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the start of battle, grants 1 #Entry_1# effect to allied CCG characters, up to 3 stacks. When allied CCG characters use active skills, additionally grants that character 1 #Entry_1# effect. For every 2 #Entry_1# effects that all allied characters have obtained, grants self 1 #Entry_2# effect, up to 6 stacks.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1075_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: At the end of your turn, deals #Entry_1# damage equal to 180% of attack to the enemy target with the highest attack, and additionally deals damage equal to 15% of your shield amount to that target. The additional damage cannot exceed 400% of your attack. When your HP first drops below 50%, grants yourself the #Entry_2# effect and fixes your next damage taken to 1 (once per battle).
skills.max_desc_short_translated: At the end of your turn, deals #Entry_1# damage equal to 180% of attack to the enemy target with the highest attack, and additionally deals damage equal to 15% of your shield amount to that target. The additional damage cannot exceed 400% of your attack. When your HP first drops below 50%, grants yourself the #Entry_2# effect and fixes your next damage taken to 1 (once per battle).

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst increases basic stats by 10% for 1 turn.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_weak_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Being Weak reduces all allied characters' damage taken by 8% for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Being Weak reduces all allied characters' damage taken by 8% for 1 turn.

skills.desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, increase your CRIT Resistance by 5%.

skills.desc_short_translated: In PVE, reduce your damage taken by 5%.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: In PVE, reduce your damage taken by 5%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_Talent_Common
skills.desc_short_translated: In PVP, increases allied [CCG] Characters' DEF-related stats by 4%.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: In PVP, increases allied [CCG] Characters' DEF-related stats by 4%.

skills.desc_short_translated: When HP drops to 50% for the first time in battle, become immune to debuffs for 1 turn.

skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In PVP, reduce allied CCG characters’ damage taken by 3%.
